heading: Contracts in foreign countries
label: 2676 Contracts in foreign countries
text: The Secretary of State is authorized to enter into contracts in foreign countries involving expenditures from funds appropriated or otherwise made available to the Department of State, without regard to the provisions of : , That nothing in this section shall be construed to waive the provisions of .section 6306 of title 41section 431 of title 18Provided
